title: Silent disco to raise funds for NSRI
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Get ready to groove to...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Get ready to groove to music while supporting the National Sea Rescue Institute (NSRI) in Mossel Bay.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Get ready to groove to music while supporting the National Sea Rescue Institute (NSRI) in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With your headphones on, you'll be transported into a world of music, where you can switch between channels to suit your mood, from Afrikaans pop to 80s hits.","html":"With your headphones on, you'll be transported into a world of music, where you can switch between channels to suit your mood, from Afrikaans pop to 80s hits."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dance to your favourite tunes, knowing your participation is making a difference in ensuring the safety of our coastal community.","html":"Dance to your favourite tunes, knowing your participation is making a difference in ensuring the safety of our coastal community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hartenbos","html":"Hartenbos"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This \"silent disco\" takes place on Friday, 22 March from 17:00 to 19:00 at the Hartenbos Seefront centre court.","html":"This \"silent disco\" takes place on Friday, 22 March from 17:00 to 19:00 at the Hartenbos Seefront centre court."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets cost R80 and are available at Quicket or at the event.","html":"Tickets cost R80 and are available at Quicket or at the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"See: www.quicket.co.za/events/252044-hartenbos-seefront-silent-disco-nsri-fundraiser.","html":"See: www.quicket.co.za/events/252044-hartenbos-seefront-silent-disco-nsri-fundraiser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An organiser for the event said: \"Ticket proceeds will directly benefit the NSRI, contributing to its vital efforts in safeguarding our shores and saving lives at sea. Don't miss this opportunity to dance for a cause and make a splash in supporting our local heroes.\"","html":"An organiser for the event said: \"Ticket proceeds will directly benefit the NSRI, contributing to its vital efforts in safeguarding our shores and saving lives at sea. Don't miss this opportunity to dance for a cause and make a splash in supporting our local heroes.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, contact Chandré (072 233 4966).","html":"For more information, contact Chandré (072 233 4966)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.","html":"We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news."}]

images.alt: Silent disco to raise funds for NSRI
